quicksight.dashboard.emptyvisual.CfnAbou:
An empty visual.

Empty visuals are used in layouts but have not been configured to show any data. A new visual created in the Amazon QuickSight console is considered an `EmptyVisual` until a visual type is selected.

quicksight.dashboard.emptyvisual.Actions.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.emptyvisual.DataSet.Description: The data set that is used in the empty visual. Every visual requires a dataset to render.

quicksight.dashboard.emptyvisual.VisualI.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
